narrative:
Hubbard Twp F (precinct in Trumbull County) has 932 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.4 percentage points.
